sections.name: Main menu highlights
items: Chipotle Deviled Eggs - hot sauce, scallions
Pimento Cheese - hook's 3 year cheddar, pepper jelly, b&b pickles, fried saltines
Masa Pancakes - mole-spiced maple syrup, whipped agave butter
Little Gem Salad - radish, carrot, queso fresco, pepitas, herby breadcrumbs, burnt chili vinaigrette
OK Onion Burger - kilgus beef patty, grilled onions, bread & butter pickles, american cheese, comeback sauce, sesame seed bun
Tlayuda - giant crispy masa tortilla, refried black beans, snap peas, stracciatella, preserved lemon, salsa verde, spring greens

sections.name: Sides and drinks
items: Dirty Horchata Latte - spiced coffee infused vodka, cold brew, oat milk, cinnamon, almond, vanilla

Little Gem Salad - root vegetables, queso fresco, pepitas, herby breadcrumb, burnt chili vinaigrette

notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menu explicitly included almond in the Dirty Horchata Latte.
